meta.task: TASK C - engine disposition (main vs containment-fix) x tape frequency
meta.method: classify_legs via wc_backtest-identical RfqLeg+StubMeta; OK verdicts resolved to the sgp pair-prior key via build_sgp_correlation on the bare pair (shipped PricingConfig, marginals 0.60); structural_applicable recorded (DC/margin-total tries first on those, copula key is its fallback). Embedded = pair + 2 real cross-game legs (4-leg combo). Classification only - no joint pricing.
meta.tape: combos = distinct combo markets containing >=1 matching ordered (A,B) pair; prints = pregame prints of those combos; a combo counts once per shape and once per shape x mix. NO WNBA/UFC/tennis/golf legs exist in these caches (series inventory checked): S44-S50 zeros are cache scope, not board absence.
